summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Flixz streaming features including embedded streaming sources and custom content upload functionality. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with excellent streaming source integration and custom upload capabilities.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description warning for DialogContent component
design_issues.details: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility - functional impact is minimal

passed_tests: Backend API health check
User registration and authentication for streaming features
Movie details API for watch page (movie ID 872585 - Oppenheimer)
Custom content upload API with multipart form data
Custom content list API (empty and with content)
Custom content retrieval API by ID
Custom content deletion API
Watch page loads correctly for movie 872585
Movie title and year displayed in watch page header (Oppenheimer 2023)
Streaming source picker button functionality
VidSrc Pro selected by default as expected
All 6 streaming source options available (VidSrc Pro, Embed.su, MultiEmbed, VidSrc, 2Embed, Trailer Only)
Source switching functionality (successfully switched to Embed.su)
Source picker dropdown with all expected options
Back button present on watch page
My Uploads link visible in sidebar for logged in users
My Uploads page accessible at /my-uploads
Upload button and dialog functionality
Upload form with title, description, video and poster fields
Custom content page layout and navigation

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (15/15 streaming features UI tests passed, 1 minor accessibility warning)
